title: RGAS and PGAS to work on gas network project worth IDR 29.5 billion
body: PT Kian Santang Muliatama Tbk (RGAS) and PT Perusahaan Gas Negara Tbk (PGAS) have collaborated to work on gas network construction project with a contract value of ID 29.5 billion.

title: JSMR owns 26% of shares in Bogor-Serpong Toll Road operator
body: PT Jasa Marga (Persero) Tbk (JSMR) made capital investment in PT Bogor Serpong Infra Selaras (BSIS), a joint venture managing Bogor-Serpong via Parung Toll Road.

title: Vice Minister of Religion: High-quality human resources required for sharia economic centre
body: There is a need for capable and reliable human resources to boost Indonesia as sharia economic centre.

title: BTON will distribute cash dividend of IDR 10 per share
body: PT Betonjaya Manunggal Tbk (BTON) will schedule a cash dividend payment of IDR 7.2 billion or IDR 10 per share.

title: IDXESGL welcomes 3 issuers as new constituents
body: Three issuers are now listed as constituents of IDX ESG Leaders (IDXESGL) following a major evaluation in September 2024.

title: RGAS and PGAS to work on gas network project worth IDR 29.5 billion
body: PT Kian Santang Muliatama Tbk (RGAS) and PT Perusahaan Gas Negara Tbk (PGAS) have collaborated to work on gas network construction project with a contract value of ID 29.5 billion.

title: JSMR owns 26% of shares in Bogor-Serpong Toll Road operator
body: PT Jasa Marga (Persero) Tbk (JSMR) made capital investment in PT Bogor Serpong Infra Selaras (BSIS), a joint venture managing Bogor-Serpong via Parung Toll Road.

title: Vice Minister of Religion: High-quality human resources required for sharia economic centre
body: There is a need for capable and reliable human resources to boost Indonesia as sharia economic centre.

title: BTON will distribute cash dividend of IDR 10 per share
body: PT Betonjaya Manunggal Tbk (BTON) will schedule a cash dividend payment of IDR 7.2 billion or IDR 10 per share.

title: IDXESGL welcomes 3 issuers as new constituents
body: Three issuers are now listed as constituents of IDX ESG Leaders (IDXESGL) following a major evaluation in September 2024.

title: HEXA to expand to Foton vehicle reparation business
body: PT Hexindo Adiperkasa Tbk (HEXA) will expand its business reach to reparation services for Foton cars and trucks, a Chinese vehicle brand, starting this year.

title: Diversifying, Adaro to divest thermal coal business
body: PT Adaro Energy Indonesia Tbk (ADRO) plans to divest portions in one of its subsidiaries engaged in thermal coal mining business, PT Adaro Andalan Indonesia (AAI).

title: Focusing on digital business, Krom Bank Indonesia to divest assets for IDR 2.95 billion
body: PT Krom Bank Indonesia Tbk (BBSI) has sold its assets in Bandung worth IDR 2.95 billion.

title: Buana Finance to secure credit facility of IDR 300 billion from Bank HSBC
body: PT Buana Finance Tbk (BBLD) has signed a credit facility agreement with PT Bank HSBC Indonesia.

title: Billions of Gojek Tokopedia shares sold, net foreign volume plunges to -895.13 million shares
body: In contrast to the previous day, shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) became the most sold on Tuesday, September 10, with foreign investors selling up to 2.74 billion shares for a net volume of -918.65 million shares. This share-selling activity resulted in an increase in foreign sales volume, which reached 4.40 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buying volume was 3.51 billion shares, causing net foreign volume to drop to -895.13 million shares.

title: Foreign buying volume increases, net foreign volume closed at 70.28 million shares
body: On Monday, September 9, foreign share purchase transactions increased and resulted in a foreign purchase volume of 2.46 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales volume stood at 2.39 billion shares. As a result, the net foreign sales volume ended at 70.28 million shares. The biggest contributor to the increase in foreign buying volume was the purchase of 811.71 million shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) with a net volume of 149.16 million shares.

title: Goldman Investindo as controlling shareholder, sells 400 million Indo Boga Sukses (IBOS) shares
body: The controlling shareholder, PT Goldman Investindo Sedaya, sold 400 million shares of PT Indo Boga Sukses Tbk (IBOS), an issuer in the food and beverage industry, on Friday, September 6. The sale transaction reduced this investor's shareholding to 50.83% from approximately 55.79% previously. Also, PT Trust Sekuritas was designated to handle the transaction.

title: Securing syndicated loan of IDR 200 billion, PURI to work on The Monde City
body: PT Puri Karya Bersama (PKB), a subsidiary of PT Puri Global Sukses Tbk (PURI), has secured a syndicated revolving loan for working capital from 13 rural credit banks worth IDR 200 billion.

title: Tender offer of BINO's shares concluded, Ruhong spent IDR 56.36 billion
body: The portion of Ruhong Holding Pte. Ltd. in PT Perma Plasindo Tbk (BINO) now increases to 89.63% from 72% of total issued and paid-up capital of said issuer, which had just been concluded last week (5/9).

title: State sukuk recorded incoming bids of IDR 21.27 trillion
body: The amount of incoming bids for the last auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk on September 10, 2024, reportedly reached IDR 21.27 trillion, as stated by DJPPR of the Ministry of Finance.

title: Komarudin Hidayat: Sharia banks can triumph supported by professionalism
body: Prof. Dr. Komarudin Hidayat, Commissioner of PT Bank Syariah Indonesia Tbk (BRIS), believes that sharia banking industry in Indonesia still has potential to rapidly grow if accompanied with professionalism in its development.

title: Islamic Leaders Conference 2024 officially held today
body: Menara Syariah and the Brunei Institute of Leadership & Islamic Finance (BILIF) are collaborating to hold the Islamic Leaders Conference (ILC) 2024 which will be held for two days on September 11-12, 2024, at Menara Syariah, PIK 2.

title: Retail sales expected to decline in October 2024
body: Sales performance in the next six months starting from October 2024 to January 2024 is expected to decline, due to the return to normal demand after national religious holidays and year-end holidays.

title: After moving up, JCI seen sluggish towards midday
body: Having strengthened at the beginning of the opening bell, the Composite Stock Price Index weakened towards the closing of transactions at 11.30 WIB. At the start of trading, the JCI was at the level of 7,794.83, up from 7,779.24 at 09.00 WIB.

title: Ministry of Finance accepts DPR's proposal for 2.5% excise tax on sugary drinks
body: The Ministry of Finance (Kemenkeu) has received a proposal from the DPR RI State Financial Accountability Agency (BAKN), regarding the excise rate for packaged sugary drinks (MBDK) of 2.5%.

title: INKP to issue rupiah and dollar bond for refinancing
body: PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk (INKP), a paper and carton package manufacturer under Sinarmas Group, will issue Shelf-Registration Bond V Phase I Year 2024 with total principal of IDR 2.5 trillion.

title: EXCL and LINK agree on transaction worth IDR 12.94 trillion
body: PT XL Axiata Tbk (EXCL) will reportedly lease hybrid fiber coaxial and fiber to the home (HFC/FTTH) of PT Link Net Tbk (LINK) worth IDR 11.06 trillion.

title: Lontar Papyrus Pulp & Paper issues IDR 2.5 trillion bonds and sukuk
body: PT Lontar Papyrus Pulp & Paper Industry, a pulp and tissue producer belonging to the Sinarmas Group, will issue Shelf Registration Bonds III Phase I/2024 and Shelf Registration Mudharabah Sukuk I Phase I/2024 with a total principal amount of IDR 2.5 trillion.

title: Idle IPO proceeds of IDR 9.8 trillion, OJK warns Bukalapak.com
body: Financial Services Authority (OJK) warns PT Bukalapak.com Tbk (BUKA) to immediately use the remaining proceeds of initial public offering (IPO) of IDR 9.8 trillion.

title: SULI’s subsidiary to sign a credit agreement of USD 5 million
body: PT Orimba Alam Kreasi (OAK), one of subsidiaries of PT SLJ Global Tbk (SULI), has reportedly signed a credit agreement with ACLF Investments Hong Kong Limited.

title: CMIPD to conduct tender offer for PORT’s shares
body: China Merchants International Port Integrated Development (Hong Kong) Company Limited (CMIPD) is conducting a tender offer of 725.97 million shares of PT Nusantara Pelabuhan Handal Tbk (PORT).

title: LPGI plans a stock split with 1:10 ratio
body: PT Lippo General Insurance Tbk (LPGI) will issue a stock split with a ratio set to 1:10, meaning that one old share will be split into 10 shares with new value.

title: Stable in green zone, net foreign volume surplus at 74.91 million shares
body: Remaining the same from the previous day, net foreign volume on Friday, September 6, was stable in the green zone at roughly 74.91 million shares. This figure was derived from the difference between the foreign sell volume of about 1.72 billion shares and the foreign buy volume of 1.79 billion shares. The list of stock purchase transactions began with the purchase of shares in two banking companies, PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) and PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBNI), with foreign investors purchasing 126 million shares of BBRI for a net volume of 83.37 million shares and 120.60 million shares of BBNI for a net volume of 77.17 million shares.

title: Trimegah Sekuritas now owns 7.29% of Delta Dunia Makmur (DOID)
body: On Thursday, September 5, prevalent securities firm PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk acquired a new stake in PT Delta Dunia Makmur (DOID). Trimegah acquired 557.60 million shares in total, instantly acquiring 7.29% of the parent company that provides contractor services for coal mining.

title: Caught in acquisition rumour, MNC Group denies affiliation with MNC Capital Partners
body: PT MNC Kapital Indonesia Tbk (BCAP) denies the issue of acquisition led by MNC Capital Partners, LP over Vista Outdoor (VSTO.N).

title: KRYA secures new contracts worth IDR 24.65 billion
body: PT Bangun Karya Perkasa Jaya Tbk (KRYA) has secured new contracts worth IDR 24.65 billion in order to fund the construction of warehouse and office of PT Elson Bernardi.

title: Angkasa Pura I and II to be merged to Angkasa Pura Indonesia
body: PT Angkasa Pura I and PT Angkasa Pura II have been officially merged together, becoming PT Angkasa Pura Indonesia (API).

title: Artha Kencana Rayatama issues portion raise in AKRA
body: PT Artha Kencana Rayatama (AKRT) has increased its portion in PT AKR Corporindo Tbk (AKRA) by acquiring 32.09 million shares.

title: Golden Westindo Artajaya to offer 685.7 million shares in IPO
body: PT Golden Westindo Artajaya Tbk (GWAA), a shrimp and fish seeds’ feed wholesale company, will conduct its Initial Public Offering (IPO) in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) by issuing 685.7 million shares.

title: Shareholders gave a nod to SMIL’s plan of raising funds
body: PT Sarana Mitra Luas Tbk (SMIL) has gained approval from shareholders to seek new credit facilities or extend its existing credit facilities.
